name: Load Balancer Migration (CLB to ALB/NLB)
description: Migrate from Classic Load Balancer to Application or Network Load Balancer for improved features and performance

template.description: Migrating from {{currentLB}} to {{targetLB}} for {{targetCount}} backend targets handling {{requestsPerSecond}} requests/second. Migration includes DNS cutover, SSL certificate migration, health check configuration, and validation of routing rules and sticky sessions.
template.currentState: {{currentLB}} distributing traffic to {{targetCount}} EC2 instances. Handling {{requestsPerSecond}} req/sec. SSL termination at load balancer. Health checks every 30 seconds. Session stickiness enabled. DNS TTL: 60 seconds.
template.proposedState: {{targetLB}} with target groups for {{targetCount}} instances. Advanced routing rules, path-based routing, and host-based routing configured. SSL certificates migrated to ACM. Enhanced health checks with custom paths. Connection draining: 300 seconds.
template.trafficPatterns: Production traffic with global users. Peak load during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM EST). Mix of HTTP/HTTPS traffic. Long-lived connections for some API endpoints. SSL/TLS required. Average response time: 200ms.
